title: Most news apps are designed to keep you scrolling.
body:
We built Headlinne to do the opposite. We believe that staying informed shouldn't feel like a chore or a constant race to keep up with every headline. The problem with modern news isn't the volume of information. It is the noise.

Our philosophy is simple. We use AI not to feed you more, but to filter better. We want to strip away the clutter so you can actually digest the stories that matter to you. It is about giving you back your time instead of demanding it.

True personalization means understanding what you care about and delivering it clearly. It means respecting your attention. We are trying to prove that you can be well-informed without feeling overwhelmed.
cta: If you are looking for a quieter way to stay on top of the news, take a look at HEADLINNE.com.
